title: How to Stop a Dog Pulling on Leash (2026) – 5 Proven Techniques
seoTitle: How to Stop Dog Pulling on Leash – 5 Proven Methods | GetPawsy
seoDescription: Stop your dog pulling on the leash with 5 proven techniques. Be-a-tree method, direction changes, and harness selection. Trainer-approved.
h1Override: How to Stop a Dog Pulling on Leash – 5 Proven Techniques
excerpt: Five proven techniques to eliminate leash pulling: the tree method, direction changes, reward zones, and proper equipment selection.
quickAnswer: The fastest way to stop pulling: (1) Switch to a front-clip harness, (2) Stop walking every time the leash goes taut, (3) Reward every few steps of loose-leash walking. Most dogs improve within 5–7 days of consistent practice.

faq.question: Why does my dog pull even with a harness?
faq.answer: Back-clip harnesses actually encourage pulling (sled-dog mechanics). Switch to a front-clip harness that redirects momentum. Equipment alone doesn't fix pulling — combine with the be-a-tree technique for lasting results.

sections.heading: 5 Techniques That Actually Work
sections.content:
**1. The Be-A-Tree Method:** Stop completely when the leash goes taut. Wait. Resume when loose. Your dog learns: pulling = no forward progress.

**2. Direction Changes:** Turn 180° whenever your dog pulls ahead. They learn to watch you instead of forging forward.

**3. The Reward Zone:** Mark and treat whenever your dog walks beside you. Create a 'bubble' of value at your side.

**4. Front-Clip Harness:** Redirects pulling momentum toward you. Browse [no-pull harnesses →](/collections/dog-leash-control).

**5. High-Value Treats:** Use chicken, cheese, or liver — not kibble. You're competing against squirrels and fire hydrants.

For the complete 7-day protocol, read our [Leash Training Step-by-Step Guide →](/guides/leash-training-dog-step-by-step).

sections.heading: Equipment That Accelerates Results
sections.content:
The right leash and harness make training dramatically easier:

- **Front-clip harness:** The single most impactful equipment change. [Browse harnesses →](/collections/dog-leash-control)
- **6-foot fixed leash:** Standard training length. Never use retractable leashes for training
- **Treat pouch:** Keeps rewards instantly accessible for the critical 2-second reward window

For complete equipment recommendations, see our [Dog Training Tools Guide →](/guides/dog-training-tools-explained).
